_meta.description: This file contains the list of projects completed for real clients in a freelance capacity. Each entry includes the project name, a client-facing description, current status, live deployment URL, and an optional image. This data powers the Work Done section visible in freelance mode only.

fields.name: Display name of the client project.
fields.desc: A client-facing description of the project — what was built, for whom, and what value it delivered.
fields.status: Current status of the project (e.g. Completed, In Progress).
fields.deployment: Live URL of the delivered project.
fields.image: URL or path to a screenshot or preview image of the project. Can be empty if not yet available.

projects.name: Tanukrit
projects.desc: Development, deployment and maintenance of Tanukrit's business landing website. Built for a non-technical client with complete understanding of their vision and design requirments and on-time delivery.
